nodes.name: Naruto Uzumaki
nodes.bio: A hyperactive ninja who hosts the Nine-Tails Fox, driven by his dream to become Hokage and earn recognition from his village.

nodes.name: Monkey D. Luffy
nodes.bio: A rubber-powered pirate captain with an unshakable dream of becoming King of the Pirates, known for his carefree spirit and fierce loyalty.

nodes.name: Gon Freecss
nodes.bio: An optimistic boy with extraordinary raw potential, hunting for his absent father while pushing the limits of what a Hunter can achieve.

nodes.name: Eren Yeager
nodes.bio: A soldier who can transform into a Titan. His burning hatred of Titans and desire for freedom eventually drives him toward an apocalyptic plan.

nodes.name: Light Yagami
nodes.bio: A genius student who acquires a supernatural notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it, becoming the self-appointed god of a new world.

nodes.name: Edward Elric
nodes.bio: A young alchemist who sacrificed his limbs in a failed attempt to resurrect his mother and now searches for the Philosopher's Stone to restore what was lost.

nodes.name: Killua Zoldyck
nodes.bio: Born into a family of elite assassins, Killua befriends Gon and gradually breaks free from his brutal upbringing using his electricity-based Nen abilities.

nodes.name: Spike Spiegel
nodes.bio: A bounty hunter drifting through space with a haunted past, a deceptively calm demeanor, and lethal Jeet Kune Do martial arts skills.

nodes.name: Levi Ackerman
nodes.bio: Humanity's strongest soldier, cold and ruthless in battle but fiercely protective of those under his command.

nodes.name: Roronoa Zoro
nodes.bio: A swordsman who wields three blades and swore to become the world's greatest, second only in loyalty to his captain Luffy.

nodes.name: Sasuke Uchiha
nodes.bio: A gifted ninja consumed by the desire for revenge against his brother, whose path constantly mirrors and contrasts Naruto's own journey.

nodes.name: L Lawliet
nodes.bio: The world's greatest detective, eccentric and unpredictable, who becomes Light's sole intellectual equal in a high-stakes battle of wits.

nodes.name: Alphonse Elric
nodes.bio: Edward's younger brother, whose soul is bound to a suit of armor after the failed resurrection, gentle in nature but formidable in battle.

nodes.name: Tanjiro Kamado
nodes.bio: A kind-hearted boy who becomes a Demon Slayer after his family is massacred, driven by empathy even toward the demons he must destroy.

nodes.name: Itachi Uchiha
nodes.bio: A prodigy who massacred his own clan to protect the village, carrying the weight of a terrible secret beneath a villainous facade.
